Cases.Label: 03. Tools Inventory
Cases.Question: List the important validation and utility scripts in tools/ and identify the canonical GUI test runner and the canonical full-game smoke runner.

Cases.Label: 07. Main Scene And Autoloads
Cases.Question: Extract the project name, version, main scene, and full autoload singleton list. Include the autoload count.

Cases.Label: 09. Runtime Flow Overview
Cases.Question: Summarize the high-level runtime flow from boot to root_game and the core managers it brings online.

Cases.Label: 13. test_harness.gd
Cases.Question: Summarize the purpose of the GUI test harness script, including how it selects suites/tests and how it reports completion or failure.

Cases.Label: 15. GUI Test Runner
Cases.Question: Summarize what this GUI test runner does, including its canonical scene, isolation behavior, save seeding, timeout behavior, and popup/crash handling.

Cases.Label: 18. Autorun Output Log
Cases.Question: Summarize what happened during this run, including startup markers, warnings, and any pass/fail indicators.

Cases.Label: 20. Specific Historical Failure Log
Cases.Question: Summarize the failure in this log. Identify the exact script error, whether the run still reached its completion marker, and any likely implication for shutdown integrity.

Cases.Label: 24. Runtime Entrypoints Search
Cases.Question: Group these entrypoint and runner references by topic: smoke flow, test harness, loading screen, and root game. Return the key files for each topic.

Cases.Label: 26. Async, Validity, And Signal Patterns
Cases.Question: Group matches by pattern (is_instance_valid, await, .connect(). For each pattern, summarize how widespread it is and name the main hotspot files.

Cases.Label: 38. Enemy Manager Full Read
Cases.Question: Summarize Enemy_Manager.gd: enemy lifecycle/spawn responsibilities, tracking structures, and the runtime coordination it performs.
